summary: Implemented freeze-manifest/transcript capture under conversation export and proved the export lane can consume the frozen artifact instead of the saved brief surrogate.
gaps: Native provider message IDs are not yet captured; the current anchor mode is derived from normalized block order plus speaker hash and capture pass ID.
session_id remains missing for this test lane because the source surface available in-repo was a saved artifact, not a native provider transcript API.
There is still no dedicated replay/query CLI over freeze plus export indexes.
